custody_adjustment.note: Va. Code § 20-108.2(G)(3): when the parent with fewer overnights has more than 90 days/year, the presumptive amount is the shared-custody formula (shared support need = basic schedule obligation × 1.4, cross-multiplied by each parent's custody share and income share) UNLESS the sole-custody amount is less, in which case the lesser amount applies (subsection (a)/(f)).

deviation_note: Above $42,500/month combined gross income (raised from $35,000 by SB 805, eff. 2025-07-01), Virginia's own statutory formula applies directly: the $42,500 obligation plus a percentage of income above that (2.6%-5.0% by number of children) -- not a discretionary court determination. The shared-custody formula's add-on cost split (each parent's own childcare/health insurance costs credited separately) is approximated here as a single combined figure, since this calculator collects one childcare/health-insurance amount rather than a separate figure per parent.
